personal.name: Ian Sonoda McFarland
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.bio: Recent Graduate from McGill University. Currently building a freelance management application.

projects.title: Project Alpha
projects.description: A complex application that does amazing things.
projects.content:
Welcome to Project Alpha. This is where I go into deep detail about the project in a blog style format.

It was built using the best tools available at the time and solved a major set of problems related to scale and real-time processing.

projects.title: Project Beta
projects.description: Another great project, showcasing my backend skills.
projects.content:
Welcome to Project Beta. This is where I go into deep detail about the project in a blog style format.

Weighing the soul of incoming HTTP requests using proof-of-work to stop AI crawlers and other malicious bots.

projects.title: FreelanceHub
projects.description: A full-featured freelance management dashboard for tracking clients, projects, invoices, and time — all in one place.
projects.content:
Welcome to the most meta project in my portfolio - the very website you're reading this on! Nyx is my personal portfolio and blog built with performance and simplicity in mind.

A full-featured freelance management dashboard for tracking clients, projects, invoices, and time — all in one place. Built to replace a mess of spreadsheets with a clean, real-time SaaS experience.
